title: Parse a UTF-8-safe prefixed string
prompt: Given: `def take_char(<<c::utf8, rest::binary>>), do: {<<c::utf8>>, rest}`. Extend this into `decode_utf8_prefix/2` that takes a binary and an integer `n`, returning `{taken_chars, rest}` where `taken_chars` is a binary containing the first `n` UTF-8 code points. Implement with recursion using a `<<c::utf8, rest::binary>>` head pattern. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Utf8 do ... end`.
tier_rationale: UTF-8 byte-boundary awareness combined with recursion. Multi-byte code points trip naive approaches.
